visa_types.name: International conferences, seminars, symposia, cultural and sport events
visa_types.documents_required:
Document Checklist – Click here (https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/en/visa-and-services/schengen-visa#4398_zfwa_inpage_nav_8)
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[svk > arg > en > Table:International conferences > Visa Fees 1]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid at the Visa application centre in Cash or by Debit/Credit Card
VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 45 Euros payable in cash or by Debit/Credit Card.
Please Note:
- The child between 0 - 12 years on the date of submission at VFS are Biometric exempt.
- The applicable visa fee in Argentinian Pesos is as per the exchange rate informed by Slovakian Embassy. Please confirm via email the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.
visa_types.processing_time: From the date of receipt of application at the Embassy of Slovakia, it takes 15 working days to process the visa application. The duration of days when the application is in transit between the Visa Application Centre and the Embassy are not counted.
visa_types.forms:
Application for Visa (https://www.mzv.sk/documents/10195/2466408/003%20%C5%BDiados%C5%A5%20o%20schengensk%C3%A9%20v%C3%ADzum%20EN%202020.pdf/118f2b19-1cf5-4b88-a071-7f15b052aa9b)
To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Individuals travelling to Slovakia for international conferences, seminars, symposia, cultural and sport events purpose can apply.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Individuals travelling to Slovakia for international conferences, seminars, symposia, cultural and sport events purpose can apply.

## Visa Fees

[svk > arg > en > Table:International conferences > Visa Fees 1]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid at the Visa application centre in Cash or by Debit/Credit Card
VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 45 Euros payable in cash or by Debit/Credit Card.
Please Note:
- The child between 0 - 12 years on the date of submission at VFS are Biometric exempt.
- The applicable visa fee in Argentinian Pesos is as per the exchange rate informed by Slovakian Embassy. Please confirm via email the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.

## Documents Required
Document Checklist – Click here (https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/en/visa-and-services/schengen-visa#4398_zfwa_inpage_nav_8)
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.

## Photo Specifications
Please provide one recent colour photograph (not more than 6 months old) of yourself, meeting the following requirements:
- Taken against a light (white or off-white) background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background.
- Clear quality and with the face in focus
- Full face: non-smiling, no sunglasses, no hat/cap or any head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of his/her religious belief or ethnic background
- Printed on normal photographic paper (camera print)
- Please stick the photograph on the Visa Application Form
If the photographs presented do not meet these requirements (click here), then the visa application will be considered incomplete and applicant will be asked to take new photographs in the photo booth in the visa application centre. 

## Processing Time
From the date of receipt of application at the Embassy of Slovakia, it takes 15 working days to process the visa application. The duration of days when the application is in transit between the Visa Application Centre and the Embassy are not counted.

## Download Forms
Application for Visa (https://www.mzv.sk/documents/10195/2466408/003%20%C5%BDiados%C5%A5%20o%20schengensk%C3%A9%20v%C3%ADzum%20EN%202020.pdf/118f2b19-1cf5-4b88-a071-7f15b052aa9b)
To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

visa_types.name: Family member/ Spouse and children of EA/ EU citizens/nationals
visa_types.documents_required:
Document Checklist – Click here (https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/en/visa-and-services/schengen-visa#4398_zfwa_inpage_nav_8)
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[svk > arg > en > Table:Family member/ Spouse > Visa Fees 1]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid at the Visa application centre in Cash or by Debit/Credit Card
VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 45 Euros  payable in cash or by Debit/Credit Card.
Please Note:
- The child between 0 - 12 years on the date of submission at VFS are Biometric exempt.
- The applicable visa fee in Argentinian Pesos is as per the exchange rate informed by Slovakian Embassy. Please confirm via email the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.
The visa fee is waived for:
- spouses and children of EU citizens/nationals.
The spouse must present a marriage certificate /duly translated into English language if necessary/ and valid EU citizen’s passport. For accompanying minors, birth certificates must be presented.
- students, postgraduate students and accompanying teachers who undertake stays for the purpose of study or educational training;
- researchers, as defined in point (2) of Article 3 of Directive (EU) 2016/801 of the European Parliament and of the Council (*4), travelling for the purpose of carrying out scientific research or participating in a scientific seminar or conference
- representatives of non-profit organizations aged 25 years or less participating in seminars, conferences, sports, cultural or educational events.
visa_types.processing_time: From the date of receipt of application at the Embassy of Slovakia, it takes 15 working days to process the visa application. The duration of days when the application is in transit between the Visa Application Centre and the Embassy are not counted.
visa_types.forms:
Application for Visa (https://www.mzv.sk/documents/10195/2466408/003%20%C5%BDiados%C5%A5%20o%20schengensk%C3%A9%20v%C3%ADzum%20EN%202020.pdf/118f2b19-1cf5-4b88-a071-7f15b052aa9b)
To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
This category of visa caters to individuals travelling to Slovakia as family member/ Spouse or children of EA/ EU citizens or nationals.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This category of visa caters to individuals travelling to Slovakia as family member/ Spouse or children of EA/ EU citizens or nationals.

## Visa Fees

[svk > arg > en > Table:Family member/ Spouse > Visa Fees 1]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid at the Visa application centre in Cash or by Debit/Credit Card
VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 45 Euros  payable in cash or by Debit/Credit Card.
Please Note:
- The child between 0 - 12 years on the date of submission at VFS are Biometric exempt.
- The applicable visa fee in Argentinian Pesos is as per the exchange rate informed by Slovakian Embassy. Please confirm via email the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.
The visa fee is waived for:
- spouses and children of EU citizens/nationals.
The spouse must present a marriage certificate /duly translated into English language if necessary/ and valid EU citizen’s passport. For accompanying minors, birth certificates must be presented.
- students, postgraduate students and accompanying teachers who undertake stays for the purpose of study or educational training;
- researchers, as defined in point (2) of Article 3 of Directive (EU) 2016/801 of the European Parliament and of the Council (*4), travelling for the purpose of carrying out scientific research or participating in a scientific seminar or conference
- representatives of non-profit organizations aged 25 years or less participating in seminars, conferences, sports, cultural or educational events.

## Documents Required
Document Checklist – Click here (https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/en/visa-and-services/schengen-visa#4398_zfwa_inpage_nav_8)
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.

## Photo Specifications
Please provide one recent colour photograph (not more than 6 months old) of yourself, meeting the following requirements:
- Taken against a light (white or off-white) background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background.
- Clear quality and with the face in focus
- Full face: non-smiling, no sunglasses, no hat/cap or any head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of his/her religious belief or ethnic background
- Printed on normal photographic paper (camera print)
- Please stick the photograph on the Visa Application Form
If the photographs presented do not meet these requirements (click here), then the visa application will be considered incomplete and applicant will be asked to take new photographs in the photo booth in the visa application centre. 

## Processing Time
From the date of receipt of application at the Embassy of Slovakia, it takes 15 working days to process the visa application. The duration of days when the application is in transit between the Visa Application Centre and the Embassy are not counted.

## Download Forms
Application for Visa (https://www.mzv.sk/documents/10195/2466408/003%20%C5%BDiados%C5%A5%20o%20schengensk%C3%A9%20v%C3%ADzum%20EN%202020.pdf/118f2b19-1cf5-4b88-a071-7f15b052aa9b)
To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

Overview
This category of visa caters to people wishing to visit Slovakia for Tourist purposes. Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Business visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for business purposes. This visa is given for travel period of less than 90 days. This visa will be issued for business purpose only; for gainful professional activities (even if the work is not financially rewarded) you have to apply for a work permit.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Business visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for business purposes. This visa is given for travel period of less than 90 days. This visa will be issued for business purpose only; for gainful professional activities (even if the work is not financially rewarded) you have to apply for a work permit.

## Visa Fees

[svk > arg > en > Table:Business/ Conference > Visa Fees 1]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid at the Visa application centre in Cash or by Debit/Credit Card
VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 45 Euros  payable in cash or by Debit/Credit Card.
Please Note:
- The child between 0 - 12 years on the date of submission at VFS are Biometric exempt.
- The applicable visa fee in Argentinian Pesos is as per the exchange rate informed by Slovakian Embassy. Please confirm via email the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.

## Documents Required
Document Checklist – Click here (https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/en/visa-and-services/schengen-visa#4398_zfwa_inpage_nav_8)
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.

## Photo Specifications
Please provide one recent colour photograph (not more than 6 months old) of yourself, meeting the following requirements:
- Taken against a light (white or off-white) background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background.
- Clear quality and with the face in focus
- Full face: non-smiling, no sunglasses, no hat/cap or any head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of his/her religious belief or ethnic background
- Printed on normal photographic paper (camera print)
- Please stick the photograph on the Visa Application Form
If the photographs presented do not meet these requirements (click here), then the visa application will be considered incomplete and applicant will be asked to take new photographs in the photo booth in the visa application centre. 

## Processing Time
From the date of receipt of application at the Embassy of Slovakia, it takes 15 working days to process the visa application. The duration of days when the application is in transit between the Visa Application Centre and the Embassy are not counted.

## Download Forms
Application for Visa (https://www.mzv.sk/documents/10195/2466408/003%20%C5%BDiados%C5%A5%20o%20schengensk%C3%A9%20v%C3%ADzum%20EN%202020.pdf/118f2b19-1cf5-4b88-a071-7f15b052aa9b)

- Save the form on your computer.

## Overview
For guidelines on how to apply for a national visa for employment purposes, please click here (https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/dilli-en/visa-and-services/national-visa/employment).

## Documents Required
Application Form – Click here

## Photo Specifications
Please provide one recent colour photograph (not more than 6 months old) of yourself, meeting the following requirements:
- Taken against a light (white or off-white) background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background.
- Clear quality and with the face in focus
- Full face: non-smiling, no sunglasses, no hat/cap or any head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of his/her religious belief or ethnic background

If the photographs presented do not meet these requirements (click here), then the visa application will be considered incomplete and applicant will be asked to take new photographs in the photo booth in the visa application centre. 

## Processing Time
